title: chenopodium album var. moquinii
intro: Chenopodium album var. moquinii, also known as Quinoa or Fat-hen, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Amaranthaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chenopodium album var. moquinii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used as a food ingredient in some cultures, particularly in its edible seed form, Quinoa.
